source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for refined English portfolio UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for balanced Japanese captions, names, and metadata.
layout: Elegant 8px grids, petal-layer panels, glossy leaf accents, restrained shadows, and gallery-ready spacing.

prompts.label: Transparent magnolia blossom motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Magnolia transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a southern magnolia blossom botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A large cream magnolia blossom with thick waxy petals, gentle blush-brown petal shadows, glossy deep green oval leaves, warm brown branch segment, and sturdy sepals. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, sculptural garden flower identity, no water lily, no lotus.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include blossom, leaves, and short branch without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no floating lily pad, no lotus pod, no dahlia petals, no bouquet, no vase, no full garden scene, no hand, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Magnolia light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Magnolia", derived from the visible southern magnolia blossom cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible elegant portfolio system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Magnolia, Magnolia Blossom, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from cream waxy petals, blush shadows, glossy leaf green, warm brown branch, garden ivory surfaces, and sepal umber depth. The board must read as magnolia, not water lily, lotus, dahlia, or generic luxury beige.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, gallery navigation, portfolio dashboard metric cards, image list table, forms, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, petal-cream surfaces, magnolia-leaf primary actions, blush accent chips, branch-brown borders, layered petal cards, glossy leaf status accents, subtle wax-petal texture.
Constraints: no lily pad, no lotus pod, no dahlia rosette, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Magnolia", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Magnolia dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Magnolia". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible southern magnolia blossom cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Magnolia, Magnolia Blossom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the magnolia system language: branch-ink dark backgrounds, cream-petal text, magnolia-leaf controls, blush shadow highlights, warm brown borders, glossy leaf success states, layered petal cards, subtle wax-petal texture, 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as magnolia, not water lily, lotus, dahlia, or generic luxury beige.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, gallery navigation, portfolio dashboard metric cards, image list table, forms, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: branch-ink and sepal-umber surfaces, cream-petal foreground, magnolia-leaf active states, blush chart highlights, warm brown dividers, subtle wax-petal overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no lily pad, no lotus pod, no dahlia rosette, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Magnolia".
